title: justicia chimalapensis
intro: Justicia chimalapensis, also known as Hierba de la Luna, is a type of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Justicia chimalapensis include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia chimalapensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
